articles.author: Sangmi Cha, Youkyung Lee
articles.title: Memory Chip Frenzy Sends SK Hynix, Micron Into $1 Trillion Club - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: The breakneck surge in memory-chip stocks is intensifying, sending the market capitalizations of SK Hynix Inc. and Micron Technology Inc. above $1 trillion for the first time, as investors bet the AI boom will lead to a sustained revaluation of the industry.
